chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْأُمُورِ الَّتِي تُوجِبُ حُجَّةَ الْإِمَامِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 62 – The matters which are inevitable for the Divine Authority of the Imam<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/206)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/206)
text: إِنَّ الْأَمْرَ فِي الْكَبِيرِ مَا لَمْ تَكُنْ فِيهِ عَاهَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abu Yahya Al Wasity, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The command (Imamate) is in the eldest, for as long as there does not happen to be a inability (Caused by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, i.e., death) for him’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from abu Yahya al-Wasiti from Hisham ibn Salim from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “The leadership is with being the elder as long as he is free of defects.”
